strategies.hook: Scaling is hard when your funnel leaks. We fix that.
strategies.cta: Reply YES and I'll send over the audit details today.
strategies.message:
Hey TechScale,

Scaling is hard when your funnel leaks. We fix that.

I work with agencies dealing with scaling problems. In the last 30 days, we:
• Cut CAC by 40% for a SaaS company
• 3x'd ROAS for a marketing agency  
• Generated 200+ qualified leads for a B2B firm

Our Emergency Revenue Recovery is designed for exactly this:
14-day intensive audit + immediate fixes
Investment: $2,500 setup + $3,000/month
Guarantee: 20% ROAS improvement or money back

Reply YES and I'll send over the audit details today.

Best,
[Your Name]
execution_plan: 1. Send LinkedIn connection request with hook within 2 hours
2. Follow up with InMail/email same day if no response
3. Call directly if contact number available (Day 2)
4. Send case study specific to TechScale industry (Day 3)
6. Move to CRM if no response after 5 days
7. Escalate to sales team for direct outreach

3. Share relevant case study or content (Day 4)
